ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the block that the trial belongs to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment session */,
  "num_tri_i" INTEGER /* Internal trial index */,
  "cond" INTEGER /* Condition of the trial (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "stim_cond" TEXT /* Stimulus condition (e.g., [1, 3, 5]) */,
  "corr_resp" INTEGER /* Correct response for the trial */,
  "resp" INTEGER /* Actual response from the participant */,
  "rt" REAL /* Reaction time in seconds */,
  "acc" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response (e.g., 1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus presentation */,
  "trial_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the trial */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "response_options" TEXT /* Possible response options for the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment session */,
  "block_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the block (e.g., pure_pref) */,
  "t2t" TEXT /* Trial-to-trial condition (e.g., pure_pref) */,
  "t2t_i" INTEGER /* Internal trial-to-trial index */,
  "block_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the block */,
  "block_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the block */,
  "block_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant joined the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used for the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress, aborted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being responded to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who responded */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment session */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was made */,
  "response_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., button press, voice command) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_responses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the block that the trial belongs to
Accuracy of the response (e.g., 1 for correct, 0 for incorrect)
Possible response options for the trial
Date when the participant joined the experiment
Unique identifier for each experiment session
ID of the participant who completed the session
Location where the session was conducted
Type of device used for the session
Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress, aborted)
Unique identifier for each trial response
ID of the trial being responded to
ID of the participant who responded
Date and time when the response was made
Type of response (e.g., button press, voice command)
